CREATE TABLE test_nested (id INT, data FLOAT);
SELECT id, entropy(data) FROM test_nested WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_nested WHERE data > 0.3);
CREATE TABLE test_joint (id INT, category VARCHAR, value FLOAT);
SELECT category, entropy(value) FROM test_joint GROUP BY category;
SELECT a.id, entropy(b.value) FROM test_joint a JOIN test_nested b ON a.id = b.id;
WITH cte AS (SELECT value FROM test_entropy WHERE value > 0) SELECT entropy(value) FROM cte;
SELECT entropy(value) FROM test_entropy WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
